en.name: Glucose in blood
en.longDescription: ## Definition & Clinical Context Glucose in blood is one of the most frequently ordered laboratory measurements, monitored in diabetes mellitus, critical care, perioperative care, and many other contexts [1]. The source data will typically be a single numeric result per patient-timestamp, produced by a biochemistry analyser, a blood gas analyser, or a point-of-care glucometer. Results are reported as a substance concentration in mmol/L (SI unit, used in Europe) or as a mass concentration in mg/dL (used in the US) [2]. This concept set aggregates glucose measurements across blood specimens (serum, plasma, arterial, venous, capillary, mixed venous and unspecified blood). Cord blood and fetus specimens are excluded. **Note on capillary glucose (glucometer / POCT).** Capillary glucose measured by a glucometer (point-of-care test) is included in this concept set, but data scientists should be aware that: - Capillary glucose can differ from venous/plasma glucose by 10–15 % in the post-prandial state. - Glucometers calibrated to plasma-equivalent values are now standard, but legacy devices may report whole-blood values that are ~10–15 % lower. Study designs that require strict comparability across specimens should preserve the LOINC code and the measurement source value. ## Included Concepts The set is anchored on seven LOINC Hierarchy concepts (one per blood specimen, scoped to `Chemistry - non-challenge`), with their descendants pulled in. After exclusions, the set resolves to 21 LOINC "Lab Test" concepts, grouped here by specimen. ### Serum or plasma (default specimen for routine biochemistry) - *3013826 / 14749-6 — Glucose [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma (LOINC)*: most widely used LOINC code worldwide (SI form). - *3004501 / 2345-7 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma (LOINC)*: same measurand expressed as mass concentration (US form). - *40757626 / 54495-7 — Glucose [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma --post dialysis (LOINC)*: point-in-time measurement immediately after a haemodialysis session. ### Generic blood (specimen unspecified) - *3020491 / 15074-8 — Glucose [Moles/volume] in Blood (LOINC)* - *3000483 / 2339-0 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Blood (LOINC)*: same measurand expressed as mass concentration. - *3011424 / 2340-8 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Blood by Automated test strip (LOINC)* - *3014053 / 2341-6 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Blood by Test strip manual (LOINC)* - *43055143 / 72516-8 — Glucose [Moles/volume] in Blood by Automated test strip (LOINC)* - *46235168 / 76629-5 — Fasting glucose [Moles/volume] in Blood (LOINC)*: fasting variant. - *44816672 / 74774-1 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum, Plasma or Blood (LOINC)*: specimen-agnostic. - *46236948 / 77135-2 — Glucose [Moles/volume] in Serum, Plasma or Blood (LOINC)*: specimen-agnostic. - *46236950 / 77145-1 — Fasting glucose [Moles/volume] in Serum, Plasma or Blood (LOINC)*: specimen-agnostic fasting variant. ### Arterial blood - *3044242 / 39481-7 — Glucose [Moles/volume] in Arterial blood (LOINC)* - *3031266 / 41651-1 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Arterial blood (LOINC)*: same measurand expressed as mass concentration. - *1091312 / 104598-8 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Arterial blood by Glucometer (LOINC)* ### Venous blood - *3038515 / 39480-9 — Glucose [Moles/volume] in Venous blood (LOINC)* - *3033408 / 41652-9 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Venous blood (LOINC)*: same measurand expressed as mass concentration. - *1092005 / 104597-0 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Venous blood by Glucometer (LOINC)* ### Capillary blood (glucometer / POCT) - *3040151 / 51596-5 — Glucose [Moles/volume] in Capillary blood (LOINC)* - *3004077 / 32016-8 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Capillary blood (LOINC)* - *3001501 / 14743-9 — Glucose [Moles/volume] in Capillary blood by Glucometer (LOINC)*: point-of-care glucometer. - *3034962 / 41653-7 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Capillary blood by Glucometer (LOINC)*: point-of-care glucometer. ### Mixed venous blood - *1761753 / 100746-7 — Glucose [Moles/volume] in Mixed venous blood (LOINC)* - *1092148 / 104655-6 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Mixed venous blood (LOINC)* **Note on units.** Recommended unit follows LOINC's `EXAMPLE_UCUM_UNITS`: **`mmol/L`** (concept 8753 — millimole per litre) for `[Moles/volume]` codes and **`mg/dL`** (concept 8840) for `[Mass/volume]` codes. Conversion: `1 mg/dL ≈ 0.0555 mmol/L` (molar mass of glucose = 180.16 g/mol); `1 mmol/L ≈ 18.02 mg/dL`. ## Excluded Concepts The hierarchies above pull in 15 LOINC concepts that are explicitly excluded, grouped by reason for exclusion. ### Sequential specimen series — protocol-specific (e.g. oral glucose tolerance test, OGTT) - *3032986 / 50206-2 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --1st specimen* - *3032779 / 50212-0 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --2nd specimen* - *3030416 / 50213-8 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --3rd specimen* - *3032719 / 50214-6 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --4th specimen* - *3028944 / 50215-3 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --5th specimen* - *3032230 / 50216-1 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --6th specimen* - *3031928 / 50207-0 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --7th specimen* - *3029014 / 50217-9 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --8th specimen* - *3031929 / 50218-7 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --9th specimen* - *3032780 / 50208-8 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --10th specimen* - *3003541 / 12611-0 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma --4 hour specimen* ### Ratios — different measurand - *3046715 / 43740-0 — Glucose/Insulin [Mass Ratio] in Serum or Plasma* - *40765155 / 62418-9 — Glucose/Insulin [Ratio] in Serum or Plasma* ### Aggregated value — not a point-in-time measurement - *1002230 / 93791-2 — Glucose [Mass/volume] mean in Serum or Plasma* ### Qualitative — different measurand (presence, not a concentration) - *3014305 / 5914-7 — Glucose [Presence] in Blood by Test strip* The set also deliberately omits the following LOINC concepts: - **Cord blood and fetus specimens**: physiologically distinct from post-natal blood. - **Urine specimens**: out of scope (captured by the separate "Urinary glucose" concept set). - **CSF, body fluid, dialysis fluid, peritoneal fluid and other specimens**: out of scope for a "blood" concept set. ## Mapping Notes - **Default concept** when the source reports "glucose", "glycaemia", "sugar" without further specification: `3013826 / 14749-6 — Glucose [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma` (SI form). If the source uses US conventional units, prefer `3004501 / 2345-7 — Glucose [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma`. - **Source unit is mg/dL**: convert to mmol/L using `1 mg/dL ≈ 0.0555 mmol/L` (i.e. divide by 18.02). - **Source reports a fingerstick / capillary / glucometer / POCT glucose**: map to the corresponding Capillary blood code (`14743-9`, `41653-7`, `32016-8`, `51596-5`). - **Source reports a fasting glucose**: map to `46235168 / 76629-5 — Fasting glucose [Moles/volume] in Blood` or `46236950 / 77145-1 — Fasting glucose [Moles/volume] in Serum, Plasma or Blood`. - **Source reports an OGTT (oral glucose tolerance test) series** (e.g. 0, 30, 60, 90, 120 min after 75 g oral glucose): do **not** map to this concept set. OGTT timepoints are out of scope. - **Do not confuse with**: HbA1c (different measurand, separate concept set), urinary glucose, glucose/insulin ratio, mean glucose. ## References [1] Regenstrief Institute. LOINC code 14749-6 — Glucose [Moles/volume] in Serum or Plasma. Available: https://loinc.org/14749-6/ [2] Nomenclature for Properties and Units (NPU). IFCC/IUPAC. NPU codes (current release). Available: https://npu-terminology.org/npu-database/
